description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed by a tall white fence, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels that allow for ample natural light. The structure is predominantly rectangular with clean, minimalist lines and a flat roof, some sections of which serve as open terraces or balconies. The property includes a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a patio area furnished with outdoor seating and umbrellas, and a small round pool or hot tub. A driveway leads to a single-car garage attached to the house, and there is a paved walkway connecting the entryway to the outdoor spaces. The exterior is finished in a smooth, white material, likely stucco or painted concrete, with black window frames providing contrast. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with large windows, flat roof, white exterior, and a fenced yard featuring a lawn, patio, and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, the main entryway, patio furniture, and a round pool or hot tub in the corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive green lawn, the garage, and the continuation of the tall white fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with more large windows, the garage entrance, and a small pool or hot tub.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lawn, a small patio area, and the side of the house with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a single door, no porch, and direct access from the paved area; no decorative columns or overhangs.
